attachments.fallback: [fuse-open/uno] New release <https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/releases/tag/v3.0.0-beta.11|Release - Uno 3.0.0-beta.11> published by mortend
attachments.text:
## Install

```
npm install @fuse-open/uno@3.0.0-beta.11

```

## Changes since v2.9.3

### Architecture

• Port codebase to .NET 6.0 and Visual Studio 2022 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/424|#424>)
• Update default output directory (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/435|#435>)
• Update packaging for .NET 6.0 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/436|#436>)
• Remove version directory inside built libraries (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/437|#437>, <https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/515|#515>)
• Update terminology on library vs. package (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/440|#440>, <https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/502|#502>)
• Print `arm` and `arm64` architectures in lowercase (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/468|#468>)
• Use the new `HttpClient` class on .NET 6.0 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/467|#467>)
• Export API to run `uno` from JavaScript/TypeScript (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/469|#469>)
• Replace `System.Drawing` on macOS and Linux (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/470|#470>)
• Hide output from external image converters (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/480|#480>)
• Make sure the `uno` command is executable (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/481|#481>)
• Swallow `InvalidOperationException` in `KillTree()` (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/484|#484>)
• Rename manifest file in libraries (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/495|#495>)
• Remove framework directory from output path (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/501|#501>)
• Various tweaks and improvements (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/490|#490>, <https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/493|#493>, <https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/496|#496>)

### unoconfig

• Remove `isRoot` and `skipIfRoot` properties (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/451|#451>)
• Rename `packages` -> `searchPaths` properties (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/453|#453>)
• Rename `packages.default` -> `references.default` (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/464|#464>)

### unoproj

• Rename `packages` -> `references` (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/454|#454>)
• Accept `lowerCamelCase` property names (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/466|#466>)
• Update unoproj and unoconfig files (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/474|#474>)
• Add `outputType` property (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/483|#483>)
• Add `outputType.appTest` option (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/494|#494>)

### uxl

• Use `lowerCamelCase` syntax (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/517|#517>, <https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/519|#519>, <https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/520|#520>)

### Android

• Make `arm64` default for debug builds (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/475|#475>)
• Upgrade to Gradle 8.2 and JDK17 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/516|#516>, <https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/518|#518>)
• Upgrade SDKs (target 34), Gradle plugin and Kotlin (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/525|#525>)

### iOS

• ~Make iOS 11 the default deployment target (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/476|#476>)~
• Make iOS 13 the default deployment target (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/525|#525>)
• Upgrade Swift to version 5 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/525|#525>)

### macOS

• Use `Microsoft.macOS.SDK` in app loader (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/438|#438>)
• Remove macOS binaries from package (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/439|#439>)
• Get macOS app loader from NuGet (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/450|#450>)
• Remove `xamarin-mac` dependency (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/479|#479>)
• Use `xcode-devteams` for information (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/511|#511>)
• Fix native library loading on .NET 6.0 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/513|#513>)

### Compiler

• Remove `GRADLE` and `UNO_TEST` defines (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/455|#455>)
• Define `TEST` when running tests (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/463|#463>)
• Require XML attribute values to be quoted (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/465|#465>)
• Return "if-test and throw" when compiling `assert` statements (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/477|#477>)
• Remove a temp hack and some old TODOs (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/485|#485>)
• Build console apps with `Main()` entrypoints (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/489|#489>)
• Accept `ForeignInclude` attributes on methods (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/491|#491>)
• Accept array arguments in attributes (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/491|#491>)
• Refactor build queue classes (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/497|#497>, <https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/503|#503>, <https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/509|#509>)
• Lazy compilation for .NET targets (opt-in) (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/487|#487>)

### C++ backend

• Use a comparer when sorting in `IncludeResolver` (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/461|#461>)
• Fix Android compile errors on macOS (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/478|#478>)
• Move Android C++ files to `uDroid/` (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/456|#456>)
• Move platform-related code to `uPlatform/` (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/457|#457>)
• Add back deprecated header on Android (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/462|#462>)
• Verify v-tables when `DEBUG_UNSAFE` is defined (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/488|#488>)
• Reorganize source files (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/492|#492>)

### UX compiler

• Transpile TypeScript and JavaScript code in UX files (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/482|#482>)

### Test runner

• Use console app loader on .NET by default (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/486|#486>)
• Use more newlines in the log output (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/498|#498>)
• Don't print stats with `--build-only` (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/510|#510>)
• Add `--clean` parameter (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/512|#512>)

### Disassembler

• Fix solution on .NET 6.0 (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/499|#499>)
• Embed resources and upgrade packages (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/500|#500>)

### UnoCore

• Remove legacy `Uno.Buffer` class (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/441|#441>)
• Remove legacy `Uno.Diagnostics.Debug` class (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/442|#442>)
• Publish `FuseOpen.UnoCore` package on NuGet (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/460|#460>)
• Use `params` in Foreign attributes (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/491|#491>)

### Uno.Graphics.Utils

• Remove reference to `Experimental.TextureLoader` (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/444|#444>)

### Uno.Permissions

• Remove legacy `Uno.Permissions` library (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/443|#443>)

### Other changes

• Kill tests after 15 minutes on CI (<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/pull/521|#521>)

<https://github.com/fuse-open/uno/compare/v2.9.3...v3.0.0-beta.11|`v2.9.3...v3.0.0-beta.11`>
